# PERF-168 positive: large struct sent by value over a channel
lang: go
file: PERF-168-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Event struct {
	ID       int64
	UserID   int64
	Action   string
	Payload  []byte
	Metadata map[string]string
	Tags     []string
}

func Emit(ch chan<- Event) {
	ch <- Event{
		ID:       1,
		UserID:   42,
		Action:   "login",
		Payload:  []byte("hello"),
		Metadata: map[string]string{"ip": "127.0.0.1"},
		Tags:     []string{"a", "b"},
	}
}
